slides.title: Executive summary

Grounded evidence suggests about 5.0 year(s) of experience across 6 structured role(s). Top strengths: Strong record in transformer-based workloads, large-scale inference, and technical leadership; Experience with production ML systems serving over 10M daily predictions. Primary watchout: No explicit mention of specific projects or contributions to open-source initiatives..
